spec.name: The Overlook
spec.description: You are standing on a point outcropping with a beautiful view of the mountains to the north. Far below, you see what appears to be a foot-path climb up to the central mountain, a peak that looks dark and disturbing. You get very bad vibes from that mountain for some reason, and it doesn't seem like a very good idea to try to find a way to get there. The only safe way to leave this overlook is to the south.
